title: `Ebronah #5684
definition:
Ebronah = "passage"

 1) one of the stations of the Israelites in the wilderness immediately
    preceding Ezion-geber
nasbUsage:

 1) one of the stations of the Israelites in the wilderness immediately
    preceding Ezion-geber

    NASB:  a place in the desert
